subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — I'm glad to hear Partner Corp is interested in exploring potential synergies with our team.

I'd be happy to arrange an introductory call. To help me find the best slot, could you share your availability for this week? I can typically make Tuesday through Thursday work, with some flexibility on timing.

Regarding the internal contact directory and direct lines you mentioned — for data protection and privacy reasons, I'm not able to share those details directly. However, once we've had our initial conversation and aligned on how our teams might work together, I'd be glad to facilitate warm introductions to the appropriate stakeholders on our side if it makes sense to move forward.

Looking forward to hearing your availability!

Best regards
